messages.author: Alec K2XAP
messages.text: Just putting it out there for anyone in the NYC area that there’s a lot of mesh organizing happening under https://nyme.sh . It’s mostly Meshtastic-based right now but a few of us are dabbling in MeshCore and there are a couple repeaters running. If you’re interested in mesh stuff around here, stop by the NYMesh discord. NJ and CT folks also welcome of course!
messages.content_html: Just putting it out there for anyone in the NYC area that there’s a lot of mesh organizing happening under https://nyme.sh. messages.author: Mike / N2QDK
messages.text: Hi @Alec K2XAP - we're building out the mesh up here in Albany and want to expand south. Do you have any contacts in the hudson valley who might be willing to host a meshcore repeater with the goal of creating a viable corridor up and down the hudson?
messages.content_html: Hi @Alec K2XAP - we're building out the mesh up here in Albany and want to expand south. Do you have any contacts in the hudson valley who might be willing to host a meshcore repeater with the goal of creating a viable corridor up and down the hudson?
messages.reactions_html: 1

messages.author: Alec K2XAP
messages.text: hi! I don't know offhand but I forwarded this into a couple relevant channels in the nyme.sh discord to see. The discord actually includes some folks in the capital region and beyond so drop in! https://discord.nyme.sh

Hi @Alec K2XAP - we're building out the mesh up here in Albany and want to expand south. Do you have any contacts in the hudson valley who might be willing to host a meshcore repeater with the goal of creating a viable corridor up and down the hudson?

messages.author: jrddunbr
messages.text: I’m going to have a MeshCore node at Hosner Mountain. If you can find some mountain in the range with Overlook Mountain to install one at, you may be able to bridge that gap to Albany.
messages.content_html: I’m going to have a MeshCore node at Hosner Mountain. If you can find some mountain in the range with Overlook Mountain to install one at, you may be able to bridge that gap to Albany.

messages.author: jrddunbr
messages.text: It covers the southern part of the valley remarkably well
messages.content_html: It covers the southern part of the valley remarkably well

messages.author: jrddunbr
messages.text: It also can hear the NJ Meshtastic mesh so MeshCore might be able to go from NY to NYC via NJ (edited)
messages.content_html: It also can hear the NJ Meshtastic mesh so MeshCore might be able to go from NY to NYC via NJ (edited)

messages.author: Mike / N2QDK
messages.text: we were just chatting on the albany meshcore public channel about a hike to artists rock this weekend
